raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "AB 705 has drastically increased access to credit-bearing courses across all racial and ethnic groups in California's community college system.",
    "More than double the number of students completed transfer-level Math and English courses in Fall of 2019 compared to Fall 2015.",
    "Prior to AB 705, the vast majority of students started community college in remedial courses, which slowed down or halted their academic progress.",
    "Students are now evaluated based on factors like their high school coursework and GPA, which increases their ability to be placed directly into transfer-level coursework.",
    "Most students under the new model receive additional academic support, such as tutoring, while taking the transfer-level course.",
    "Broader access to college-level courses is beginning to close equity gaps for Black and Latinx students in higher education.",
    "Despite increases in access to and completion of entry-level credit-bearing courses, equity gaps persist, especially in math."
  ]
}
```
